reference: For the last ten to twelve days, I have experienced weakness, lower back pain, and dark undereye circles. I have observed white froth in the urine. Last month, I had a viral fever and took a lot of antibiotics. Recently, I have also experienced erectile dysfunction. I have been taking Norfloxacin four hundred milligrams twice daily for the last three days, but there has been no improvement. Please guide me.
text: For the last 10 to 12 days I have experienced weakness, lower back pain, and dark under-eye circles. I have observed white froth in the urine. Last month I had a viral fever and took a lot of antibiotics. Recently I have also experienced erectile dysfunction. I have been taking norfloxacin 400 mg twice daily for the last 3 days, but there has been no improvement. Please guide me.
